behavior_summary: This script controls a guard NPC's basic interactions: examining (U8P_GUARD3::look), talking (U8P_GUARD3::use), proximity entry/exit (U8P_GUARD3::enterFastArea / U8P_GUARD3::leaveFastArea), simple scheduling (U8P_GUARD3::schedule), and a path/movement utility (U8P_GUARD3::func077B).
U8P_GUARD3::look: when the player 'looks' at the NPC it emits a short bark depending on life state (dead vs alive) and then suspends.

U8P_GUARD3::enterFastArea: when an actor enters the NPC's fast/trigger area the script will revive and reposition a dead guard (Npc::clrDead, Npc::clrInCombat, Npc::teleport) or, if alive, reset an external reference and invoke a movement helper (U8P_GUARD3::func077B).
U8P_GUARD3::leaveFastArea: resets/unregisters an external reference for this NPC on exit (cleanup).

U8P_GUARD3::use: starts a conversation; reads global world-state flags (hydrosFree, pyrosFree, hasHeart) to decide whether to issue urgent warnings (Titan/undead messages). Otherwise it runs a menu-driven conversation, using per-NPC flags guard3Met and guard3Pissed to vary greeting and to update NPC mood. Menu choices are presented via a local menu array and removed once chosen; 'Bye' ends the loop.

U8P_GUARD3::schedule: initializes several local numeric parameters, calls engine scheduling methods (METHOD::func143A) and, if a spawned process returns success, runs a continuation (METHOD::func133F).

U8P_GUARD3::func077B: inferred utility that spawns Npc::pathfind to move the NPC toward a target (local1), waits for completion, calls METHOD::func091C for follow-up, spawns auxiliary FREE helper(s), and toggles local1 at sequence end.
notable_control_flow: U8P_GUARD3::look branches on Npc::isDead(this) to pick between two short barks.
U8P_GUARD3::enterFastArea branches on whether the NPC is dead: if dead -> revive, clear combat, teleport; else -> FREE::resetRef and call U8P_GUARD3::func077B.

U8P_GUARD3::use counts world-state flags hydrosFree/hasHeart/pyrosFree into local3; if more than one of these are true it emits an urgent Titans/undead warning and ends the conversation; if only hasHeart is true it emits an undead warning and ends the conversation.

U8P_GUARD3::use then selects greeting based on guard3Met and guard3Pissed and enters a conversation loop: present local2 (menu), suspend to capture choice in local1, strcmp local1 to route to choice handlers, MenuRemove to remove used options, loop until 'Bye' is chosen.
U8P_GUARD3::func077B spawns a pathfind process (spawn Npc::pathfind), suspends for completion, runs METHOD::func091C, spawns auxiliary FREE::func1C19 calls, and flips/clears local1 at the end.
open_questions: What exactly does FREE::func1C19 do when spawned (timer/helper/animation); current evidence shows it is spawned several times but purpose is unclear.

Precise semantics and intended targets of local1 outside of being a menu_choice/path target (it is toggled by U8P_GUARD3::func077B and also used to store Ask result in U8P_GUARD3::use) — are these separate uses interfering or intentionally reused?
Exact effects of METHOD::func143A / METHOD::func133F / METHOD::func091C — inferred to be scheduling and post-path/movement handlers but engine-specific behaviors are unknown.
Whether guard3Met and guard3Pissed are global or per-NPC flags in the broader system (script treats them as per-NPC but storage scope depends on engine).

main_function.name: U8P_GUARD3::look
main_function.purpose: Provide a short description/bark when the player examines the guard; differentiate output if the guard is dead vs alive and then suspend the U8P_GUARD3::look process.
entry_conditions: Player performs a 'U8P_GUARD3::look' / examine action on this NPC (process type 0x0208).
Branches on the NPC's death state (Npc::isDead(this)).

function_map.name: U8P_GUARD3::look
function_map.role: examine/U8P_GUARD3::look handler that barks 'dead guardsman' or 'guardsman' depending on NPC life state

function_map.name: U8P_GUARD3::enterFastArea
function_map.role: proximity-entry behavior: revive/teleport dead NPC or reset reference and start movement helper when player enters trigger area

function_map.name: U8P_GUARD3::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: proximity-exit cleanup: reset/unregister an external reference for this NPC

function_map.name: U8P_GUARD3::schedule
function_map.role: initialize scheduling parameters and start a scheduled/timed process (calls engine scheduling methods), then possibly run follow-up on success

function_map.name: U8P_GUARD3::use
function_map.role: conversation/talk handler: issues urgent warnings based on world flags or runs a menu-driven dialog that updates per-NPC mood flags

function_map.name: U8P_GUARD3::func077B
function_map.role: movement/pathfinding utility: spawn pathfind, wait, call post-path method, toggle a local flag—used to reposition or animate the NPC

internal_calls.purpose: Invoke pathfinding/movement utility when the guard is alive on area entry (repositioning / follow-up behavior).

external_calls.purpose: Clear the NPC's dead state to revive the guard on player approach.
Clear in-combat flag/state after reviving to ensure proper NPC behavior.
Teleport revived NPC to specific map coordinates to reposition it into the world.
Reset/unregister an external reference for the NPC (cleanup or re-registration).
Spawn an auxiliary/timed helper process at conversation start (purpose inferred as timer/auxiliary helper).
Reset/unregister an external reference early in the interaction (cleanup/registration step).
Register/start an engine scheduling/timed process using local parameters.
Run a continuation/follow-up action if the scheduled/spawned process returns success.
Spawn engine pathfinding to move the NPC toward a target/location (local1).
Post-path completion method to finalize movement/animation or trigger follow-up behavior.
Spawn auxiliary helper processes around path completion (purpose inferred as timing/animation helpers).

reads.name: hydrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Contributes to an urgent Titans-related warning when set; counted by U8P_GUARD3::use.

reads.name: pyrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Contributes to an urgent Titans-related warning when set; counted by U8P_GUARD3::use.

reads.name: hasHeart
reads.likely_effect: If set, triggers an undead-specific warning branch in U8P_GUARD3::use and contributes to the urgent-warning counter.

reads.name: guard3Met
reads.likely_effect: Per-NPC 'met' flag read to choose first-meeting vs repeat greeting in U8P_GUARD3::use.

reads.name: guard3Pissed
reads.likely_effect: Per-NPC mood flag read to produce terse/angry greeting in U8P_GUARD3::use; cleared when that branch runs.

writes.name: guard3Met
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when the player first talks to the guard to remember the meeting (affects future greetings).

writes.name: guard3Pissed
writes.likely_effect: Cleared (set to 0) when the guard responds angrily; can be set by conversation branches to change mood.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script controls a guard NPC's basic interactions: examining (U8P_GUARD3::look), talking (U8P_GUARD3::use), proximity entry/exit (U8P_GUARD3::enterFastArea / U8P_GUARD3::leaveFastArea), simple scheduling (U8P_GUARD3::schedule), and a path/movement utility (U8P_GUARD3::func077B).
